VA07A VA07A_PSYCH_TR (VA07A) Psychosocial Well-being Triggered CHAR 1 RAP summary: psychological well-being - triggered. 0 = Not Triggered, 1 = Triggered, "-" = Determination precluded by missing data.
563 VA07B VA07B_PSYCH_PC (VA07B) Psychosocial Well-being Care Planning Decision CHAR 1 RAP summary: psychological well-being - proceed with care. 0 = Not Triggered, 1 = Triggered, "-" = Determination precluded by missing data.
564 VA08A VA08A_MOOD_TR (VA08A) Mood State Triggered CHAR 1 RAP
